name: John Sellers

contactInfo.office: 201 N. Davis St., Sulphur Springs, TX 75482

bio: John Sellers serves as the Mayor of Sulphur Springs, the county seat of Hopkins County. The city is known for its dairy industry and the Hopkins County Stew Festival. The mayor presides over council meetings and works to foster growth while maintaining the city's friendly, small-town atmosphere.
campaignPromises: Support dairy industry and agricultural heritage
Promote economic development and new business recruitment
Enhance quality of life through parks and recreation
